input.transcript_segment: The vegetables matter, but the resilience mechanism is the network people build while sharing tools and schedules. During a disruption, those existing relationships let neighbors coordinate information and check on older residents quickly.

target_claim.label: Gardens increase resilience by creating an organizing network.

nodes.label: Community gardens should be permanent city infrastructure.
Gardens increase resilience by creating an organizing network.
A storm showed that existing volunteers could coordinate neighbors.
